title: UpdateBlockEntity
description: Fixes a bug that deletes modded block entities.
body:
# UpdateBlockEntity (Experimental)

**NOTE: This mod is not needed in 1.18.2+!**

Fixes the bug that blocks chunks with modded block entities from being updated properly. This is an experimental mod. Remember to back up worlds before opening, it can corrupt the world!

Supports 1.18 release. Licensed under Apache 2.0.
